_description: Key KTO Trino table descriptions used by the spending baseline pipeline.

moneychange_reduce.purpose: Every Gold outflow transaction — player spends Gold on any game service.

key_columns.ds: Partition date YYYY-MM-DD — always filter on this first
key_columns.roleid: Player character ID (primary key for player)
key_columns.viplevel: VIP tier 0–18 — used as cohort proxy
key_columns.imoney: Gold amount spent in this transaction
key_columns.before: Balance before transaction — use first() per role per day for BOD balance
key_columns.after: Balance after transaction — use last() per role per day for EOD balance

moneychange_add.purpose: Every Gold inflow transaction — player receives Gold from any source.

key_columns.logway_name: LogWay_Recharge (bigtype 89) = real money top-up; others = system rewards/transfers

recharge_deliver.purpose: Real money top-up events — VND paid, Gold delivered.

key_columns.price: VND amount × 100 — ALWAYS divide by 100 for actual VND
